name: Bill's Bean Blaster
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz.) garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (16 oz.) kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large salad bowl, combine all of the beans, green and red peppers, and onions.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients. Stir until the sugar dissolves.
3. Pour the dressing over the bean mixture. Cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
4. Makes 10-12 servings.
